name: Avery Dennison Corp.
h1: Avery Dennison's GCC footprint in India
lede: Avery Dennison runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering R&D and IT, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Avery Dennison office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Avery Dennison Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Avery Dennison runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Avery Dennison's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 29 decision-makers, in one profile.
